description_long: This is a bright yellow, A-frame caution sign commonly used to warn pedestrians of a wet floor. The sign is constructed from lightweight plastic and features a handle at the top for easy carrying and placement. Both broad faces display bold black text reading 'CAUTION WET FLOOR' along with a prominent exclamation mark inside a triangle, serving as a universal warning symbol. The sign's legs are angled outward, providing stability and ensuring it remains upright when placed on flat surfaces. The interior is hollow, making the sign easy to stack and store when not in use. Its color and design are intended to maximize visibility in busy urban environments such as sidewalks, building lobbies, parking garages, and public restrooms.
description: A bright yellow, freestanding A-frame caution sign with bold black 'CAUTION WET FLOOR' text and an exclamation mark symbol. Designed for high visibility and easy portability in public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full warning message and exclamation mark symbol, with the handle visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile and A-frame structure, with the hollow interior and angled legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, identical to the front, displaying the same warning text and symbol.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin A-frame profile and hollow construction.
